description_long: This object is a long, slender knife or sword with a straight, tapered blade that appears to be made of metal. The blade features a subtle twist or spiral pattern along its length, giving it a distinctive visual texture. The coloration is primarily metallic gray with hints of blue and tan, suggesting either patina or intentional coloration. The handle is minimally differentiated from the blade, lacking a pronounced grip or pommel, and appears to be integrated into the same material as the blade. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the handle from the blade. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements.
description: A long, straight, metallic knife or sword with a twisted blade pattern and minimal handle differentiation, featuring gray, blue, and tan hues.
description_view_0: The object is seen from a slightly angled side, highlighting the twisted blade and the subtle transition between blade and handle.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the full length and slenderness of the blade, emphasizing its straight, narrow profile.
description_view_2: This side view shows the curvature and spiral pattern of the blade, with the handle blending into the blade.
description_view_3: A bottom-up view accentuates the blade's length and the lack of a distinct handle or guard.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, straight, metallic, no visible grip texture or pommel
